steps.instruction: Identify what has been done to $x$, in order.
steps.working: $x$ has been multiplied by 5, then 3 has been subtracted.

steps.instruction: Undo the operations in reverse order. First, undo the subtraction by adding 3 to both sides.
Undo the multiplication by dividing both sides by 5.
Check by substituting back into the original equation.

title: Two-step equation with a negative solution

steps.instruction: Subtract 5 from both sides to undo the addition.
Divide both sides by 2 to undo the multiplication.
Check by substituting back into the original equation.

title: Equation with variables on both sides

steps.instruction: Collect the $x$ terms on one side by subtracting $2x$ from both sides.
Add 3 to both sides to isolate the $x$ term.
Check by substituting $x = 4$ into both sides of the original equation.
